perturbation.original_text: Email: tbarnes@lawweathers.com (g) This Agreement embodies the entire agreement among the parties hereto with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements and understandings relating to such subject matter.
perturbation.changed_text: Email: tbarnes@lawweathers.com (a) For a period of three (3) years commencing on the Closing Date (the “Restricted Period”), Kennedy shall not, nor shall Kennedy permit any of his Affiliates, directly or indirectly, (i) engage in or assist others in engaging in the Autocam Business; (ii) have an interest in any Person that engages directly or indirectly in the Autocam Business in any capacity, including as a partner, shareholder, member, employee, principal, agent, trustee, or consultant; or (iii) intentionally interfere in any material respect with the business relationships (whether formed before or after the date of this Agreement) between the Company and customers or suppliers of the Company. (g) This Agreement embodies the entire agreement among the parties hereto with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements and understandings relating to such subject matter.
perturbation.explanation: Moving the non-compete obligations within the contact information and entire agreement clause makes it more difficult to be seen and reduces its enforceability.
perturbation.contradicted_law: Delaware Courts must look at the language of the Non-Compete Agreement as a whole to properly construe its terms.
perturbation.law_explanation: The code states that the provisions should be construed as a whole, this change obscures important parts of the agreement, making it more difficult for a judge to interpret correctly. The most important part of the agreement is now hidden.

perturbation.justification: The perturbation type is Structural Flaws - Legal Contradiction. The original text has a non-compete agreement clause that has been moved within the contact information and entire agreement clause. The Perturbation Explanation notes that this reduces its enforceability. The Law Explanation states that this obscures important parts of the agreement, making it more difficult for a judge to interpret correctly. Scraped Law Snippet 1 states, "The rules of construction and the definitions set forth in this chapter shall be observed in the construction of this Code and all other statutes, unless such construction would be inconsistent with the manifest intent of the General Assembly, or repugnant to the Code or to the context of the same statute." By moving the non-compete obligations, it weakens the clarity of the contract. Therefore, a contradiction exists.
